args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $progressPreference='silentlyContinue'; $work=Join-Path $env:TEMP 'cycber-host-install'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $work | Out-Null; $installer=Join-Path $work 'Tencent.QQ.NT.exe'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dldir1v6.qq.com/qqfile/qq/QQNT/Windows/QQ_9.9.29_260401_x64_01.exe' -OutFile $installer -UseBasicParsing; $hash=(Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $installer).Hash.ToUpperInvariant(); if ($hash -ne 'D52601A3224D29364F03F4948A487ECD2710DB1921383730801D795397E0A808') { throw ('installer sha256 mismatch: ' + $hash) }; $process = Start-Process -FilePath $installer -ArgumentList '/s' -Wait -PassThru; exit $process.ExitCode

$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $progressPreference='silentlyContinue'; $work=Join-Path $env:TEMP 'cycber-host-install'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $work | Out-Null; $installer=Join-Path $work 'Tencent.QQ.NT.exe'; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://dldir1v6.qq.com/qqfile/qq/QQNT/Windows/QQ_9.9.29_260401_x64_01.exe' -OutFile $installer -UseBasicParsing; $hash=(Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 -Path $installer).Hash.ToUpperInvariant(); if ($hash -ne 'D52601A3224D29364F03F4948A487ECD2710DB1921383730801D795397E0A808') { throw ('installer sha256 mismatch: ' + $hash) }; $process = Start-Process -FilePath $installer -ArgumentList '/s' -Wait -PassThru; exit $process.ExitCode

impact_summary.rollback: winget uninstall --id Tencent.QQ.NT 或通过系统应用卸载 QQ
